slides.title: The compound that clears your *aging cells*
slides.sub: It is called fisetin, and it is richest in a fruit already in your kitchen. Here is what the science suggests.

slides.title: Cells that refuse to quit
slides.body: As we age, damaged cells stop dividing but never die. These *senescent cells* linger and leak signals that can quietly inflame healthy tissue.

slides.title: Meet fisetin
slides.body: Fisetin is a plant flavonoid, and strawberries are its *richest natural source*. It is one of the most studied senolytics, the class targeting worn-out cells.

slides.title: Clearing the clutter
slides.body: In animal studies, fisetin cleared senescent cells and *extended healthy lifespan*. Human trials are early, so treat it as promising, not proven.

slides.title: Start with the strawberry
slides.body: A simple bowl of strawberries is a defensible first step. Fisetin is *linked to* less cellular inflammation, plus fiber and vitamin C.

slides.title: Food is only one lever
slides.body: No single fruit reverses aging. Sleep, movement and steady nutrition are the daily habits that *compound over decades* into real healthspan.

slides.title: Turn small habits into *good years*.
slides.body: Vibe Health scores the sleep, food, movement and steps behind aging well, all in one daily Health Score so you can see what is working.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Your body keeps cells that should have retired, and they quietly age the tissue around them. A flavonoid called fisetin may help clear them out. 🍓

Strawberries are its richest natural source, animal studies link it to longer healthy lifespan, and a simple bowl is an easy first step. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns the habits behind aging well into one daily score → link in bio.
youtube_title: Fisetin: The Strawberry Compound That Clears Aging Cells
